## Checklist (Stage 1 — research PRs)

- [ ] Only touches `evaluations/<tool-slug>.md` (or the specific docs file this PR is about)
- [ ] Every factual claim (license, stars, last commit, rate limits) is linked to its source
- [ ] License section explicitly flags AGPL / non-commercial clauses if present
- [ ] Compliance risk addressed per `docs/compliance.md` if the tool touches personal data or third-party platforms
- [ ] Fit score is justified against the pipeline table in `README.md`, not generic praise
- [ ] Recommendation (adopt/fork/reference/reject) is unambiguous with a next step
